response.step_by_step_log: Identified two songs based on on-screen text ('星座になれたら' and '天使にふれたよ!'). Used DuckDuckGo to search for Japanese and English lyrics for both, using the format: '[Song Title] [Original Artist/Source] Japanese and English lyrics'. Found sufficient lyrics to provide a representative portion of both songs. Segmented the video at 03:11 where the song and performers change.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley performed by Hololive VTubers. The first song, 'Seiza ni Naretara' from Bocchi the Rock!, is performed by Shirakami Fubuki, Hoshimachi Suisei, and Murasaki Shion. The second song, 'Tenshi ni Fureta yo!' from K-On!, is performed by Murasaki Shion and Houshou Marine.

scenes.description: VTubers (Shirakami Fubuki, Hoshimachi Suisei, Murasaki Shion) perform 'Seiza ni Naretara'. Title appears top-left.
scenes.performer_in_video: Shirakami Fubuki, Hoshimachi Suisei, Murasaki Shion
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
もうすぐ時計は6時
もう星が見えそう
君と集まって星座になれたら
切なる願い誰かに届いたら
変われるかな夜の口を
なぞるようなこんな僕でも
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Almost 6 o'clock
Already, the evening star is out there
If I could collect them and shape a constellation with you
If my earnest wish reaches someone
I wonder if I can change, even someone like me who traces the night's lips
